packages.name: cakephp/cakephp

suggest.ext-curl: To enable more efficient network calls in Http\Client.
suggest.ext-openssl: To use Security::encrypt() or have secure CSRF token generation.
suggest.lib-ICU: The intl PHP library, to use Text::transliterate() or Text::slug()
suggest.paragonie/csp-builder: CSP builder, to use the CSP Middleware

packages.description: The CakePHP framework

packages.name: cakephp/chronos
packages.description: A simple API extension for DateTime.

packages.name: composer/ca-bundle
packages.description: Lets you find a path to the system CA bundle, and includes a fallback to the Mozilla CA bundle.

packages.name: firebase/php-jwt

suggest.paragonie/sodium_compat: Support EdDSA (Ed25519) signatures when libsodium is not present

packages.description: A simple library to encode and decode JSON Web Tokens (JWT) in PHP. Should conform to the current spec.

packages.name: google/apiclient

suggest.cache/filesystem-adapter: For caching certs and tokens (using Google\Client::setCache)

packages.description: Client library for Google APIs

packages.name: google/apiclient-services
packages.description: Client library for Google APIs

packages.name: google/auth

suggest.phpseclib/phpseclib: May be used in place of OpenSSL for signing strings or for token management. Please require version ^2.

packages.description: Google Auth Library for PHP

packages.name: guzzlehttp/guzzle

suggest.ext-intl: Required for Internationalized Domain Name (IDN) support
suggest.psr/log: Required for using the Log middleware

packages.description: Guzzle is a PHP HTTP client library

packages.name: guzzlehttp/promises
packages.description: Guzzle promises library

packages.name: guzzlehttp/psr7
packages.description: PSR-7 message implementation that also provides common utility methods

packages.name: laminas/laminas-diactoros
packages.description: PSR HTTP Message implementations

packages.name: laminas/laminas-httphandlerrunner
packages.description: Execute PSR-15 RequestHandlerInterface instances and emit responses they generate.

packages.name: league/container
packages.description: A fast and intuitive dependency injection container.

packages.name: monolog/monolog

suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Allow sending log messages to AWS services like DynamoDB
suggest.doctrine/couchdb: Allow sending log messages to a CouchDB server
suggest.elasticsearch/elasticsearch: Allow sending log messages to an Elasticsearch server via official client
suggest.ext-amqp: Allow sending log messages to an AMQP server (1.0+ required)
suggest.ext-curl: Required to send log messages using the IFTTTHandler, the LogglyHandler, the SendGridHandler, the SlackWebhookHandler or the TelegramBotHandler
suggest.ext-mbstring: Allow to work properly with unicode symbols
suggest.ext-mongodb: Allow sending log messages to a MongoDB server (via driver)
suggest.ext-openssl: Required to send log messages using SSL
suggest.ext-sockets: Allow sending log messages to a Syslog server (via UDP driver)
suggest.graylog2/gelf-php: Allow sending log messages to a GrayLog2 server
suggest.mongodb/mongodb: Allow sending log messages to a MongoDB server (via library)
suggest.php-amqplib/php-amqplib: Allow sending log messages to an AMQP server using php-amqplib
suggest.rollbar/rollbar: Allow sending log messages to Rollbar
suggest.ruflin/elastica: Allow sending log messages to an Elastic Search server

packages.description: Sends your logs to files, sockets, inboxes, databases and various web services

packages.name: onelogin/php-saml

suggest.ext-curl: Install curl lib to be able to use the IdPMetadataParser for parsing remote XMLs
suggest.ext-openssl: Install openssl lib in order to handle with x509 certs (require to support sign and encryption)

packages.description: OneLogin PHP SAML Toolkit

packages.name: phpseclib/phpseclib

suggest.ext-gmp: Install the GMP (GNU Multiple Precision) extension in order to speed up arbitrary precision integer arithmetic operations.
suggest.ext-libsodium: SSH2/SFTP can make use of some algorithms provided by the libsodium-php extension.
suggest.ext-mcrypt: Install the Mcrypt extension in order to speed up a few other cryptographic operations.
suggest.ext-openssl: Install the OpenSSL extension in order to speed up a wide variety of cryptographic operations.
suggest.ext-xml: Install the XML extension to load XML formatted public keys.

packages.description: PHP Secure Communications Library - Pure-PHP implementations of RSA, AES, SSH2, SFTP, X.509 etc.
